title: Community Bank
tagline: Pooled savings and small loans for Circle members.
summary: Pooled-savings and small-loan primitives for Circle members, run on transparent on-chain rails with private membership.
description: Mutual aid is the oldest financial primitive there is, and the one most poorly served by mainstream DeFi. A Community Bank module would let a Circle pool stable-currency contributions, vote on loan disbursements, and settle repayments — all without exposing individual members' balances. Reference: ROSCAs and credit unions translated into Logos primitives (Codex for ledgers, Waku for proposals, Logos privacy primitives for member balances).
